rule_metadata.author: MikeDuddington, '@dudders1'
rule_metadata.title: Authentications To Important Apps Using Single Factor Authentication

rules.rule_text:
title: Authentications To Important Apps Using Single Factor Authentication
id: f272fb46-25f2-422c-b667-45837994980f
status: test
description: Detect when authentications to important application(s) only required
  single-factor authentication
references:
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-gb/entra/architecture/security-operations-user-accounts
author: MikeDuddington, '@dudders1'
date: 2022-07-28
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1078
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: signinlogs
detection:
  selection:
    Status: Success
    AppId: Insert Application ID use OR for multiple
    AuthenticationRequirement: singleFactorAuthentication
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- If this was approved by System Administrator.
level: medium
